code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
func getTargetForRedirect(target string, domain string) string {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Angalia kama mfuatano wa URL wa lengo uliotolewa uko ndani ya eneo lililotolewa.
Ikiwa ndivyo, rudisha URL ya lengo kwa ajili ya kuelekeza; vinginevyo, rudi kwenye URL ya eneo kwa ajili ya kuelekeza.
Tumia itifaki ya https.

Mifano:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Mfuatano wa URL wa lengo.
@param domain: Mfuatano wa eneo, bila itifaki.

@return Mfuatano wa URL kwa ajili ya kuelekeza.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Check if the provided target URL matches the given domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirection; otherwise, return the domain URL for redirection.
Use the https protocol.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Target URL string.
@param domain: Domain string, without protocol.

@return URL string for redirection.
prompt_2_segments:

Tumia itifaki ya https.

Mifano:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Mfuatano wa URL wa lengo.
@param domain: Mfuatano wa eneo, bila itifaki.

@return Mfuatano wa URL kwa ajili ya kuelekeza.

Ikiwa ndivyo, rudisha URL ya lengo kwa ajili ya kuelekeza; vinginevyo, rudi kwenye URL ya kikoa kwa ajili ya kuelekeza.

/**
Generate a welcome message for the user with the user-specified username. This message will be rendered in an HTML page after the user logs in. The message will be in the format "Welcome, <username>!".

Arguments:
- username: The username of the user.

Returns:
The welcome message for further rendering.
*/
func getWelcomeMessage(username string) string {
prompts_en:
Generate a welcome message for the user with the user-specified username. This message will be rendered in an HTML page after the user logs in. The message will be in the format "Welcome, <username>!".

Arguments:
- username: The username of the user.

Returns:
The welcome message for further rendering.
prompt_1_segments:
Tengeneza ujumbe wa kukaribisha kwa mtumiaji na jina la mtumiaji lililobainishwa na mtumiaji. Ujumbe huu utaonyeshwa kwenye ukurasa wa HTML baada ya mtumiaji kuingia. Ujumbe utakuwa katika muundo "Karibu, <username>!".

Arguments:
- username: Jina la mtumiaji wa mtumiaji.

Returns:
Ujumbe wa kukaribisha kwa ajili ya uonyeshaji zaidi.

Create a welcome message for the user with the username specified by the user. This message will be displayed on the HTML page after the user logs in. The message will be in the format "Welcome, <username>!".

Arguments:
- username: The username of the user.

Returns:
A welcome message for further display.

Arguments:
- jina la mtumiaji: Jina la mtumiaji wa mtumiaji.

Returns:
Ujumbe wa kukaribisha kwa ajili ya uonyeshaji zaidi.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en:
Create a welcome message for a user with their chosen username. This message will be displayed on the HTML page after the user logs in. The message will be in the format "Welcome, <username>!".

Arguments:
- username: The username of the user.

Returns:
A welcome message for further display.

code: // {PROMPT_1}func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {
prompts_en:
storeInfoInHeader stores the provided information in an existing HTTP response header map under the specified type.
This function considers the following information types: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. They are stored as the keys 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', and 'Cache-Control', respectively.
Information content is read from user requests.
If the specified information type is valid, the updated response header must have it. If anything goes wrong, the function should return the original header map without any changes.

Args:

infoType (string): The type of information to store in the header.
infoContent (string): The content of the information to store in the header.
header (map[string]string): The existing response header map.

Returns:

map[string]string: The updated response header map with the stored information.
prompt_1:
// storeInfoInHeader inaweka taarifa iliyotolewa katika ramani ya kichwa ya HTTP iliyopo chini ya aina iliyoainishwa.
Funguo hii inazingatia aina zifuatazo za taarifa: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Zinahifadhiwa kama funguo 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', na 'Cache-Control', mtawalia.
Maudhui ya taarifa yanasomwa kutoka kwa maombi ya mtumiaji.
Ikiwa aina ya taarifa iliyoainishwa ni halali, kichwa cha jibu kilichosasishwa lazima kiwe nacho. Ikiwa kitu chochote kinakwenda vibaya, kazi inapaswa kurudisha ramani ya kichwa ya awali bila mabadiliko.

Args:

infoType (string): Aina ya taarifa ya kuhifadhi katika kichwa.
infoContent (string): Maudhui ya taarifa ya kuhifadhi katika kichwa.
header (map[string]string): Ramani ya kichwa ya jibu iliyopo.

Returns:

map[string]string: Ramani ya kichwa ya jibu iliyosasishwa yenye taarifa iliyohifadhiwa.func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {

Args:

// Generate a private RSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
func CreatePrivateKey() string {
prompts_en: Generate a private RSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
prompt_1: // Unda ufunguo wa kibinafsi wa RSA, uhamasisha kwa kutumia muundo wa PEM, na urudishe kama string.func CreatePrivateKey() string {
prompt_1_segments: Unda ufunguo wa kibinafsi wa RSA, uhamasisha kwa kutumia muundo wa PEM, na urudishe kama string.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: Create an RSA private key, encode it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.

prompt_2_segments: Unda ufunguo wa kibinafsi wa RSA, uhamasishe kwa kutumia muundo wa PEM, na urudishe kama string.

prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms.
Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key.
- data: The data to encrypt.
Return:
- The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)
prompt_1:
// Fanya usimbuaji wa data kwa kutumia funguo kwa njia ya CBC.
Funguo iliyotolewa ina byte za kutosha (>= 64 bytes) kwa ajili ya algorithms za AES na DES.
Chagua algorithm moja tu kutekeleza na tumia awali ya byte za funguo zilizotolewa zinazolingana na urefu unaohitajika.
Usichague algorithm kulingana na urefu wa funguo.
Rejesha data iliyosimbwa, IV (vector ya awali), na funguo iliyotumika kwa usimbaji.
Arguments:
- key: Byte za kutengeneza funguo ya usimbaji.
- data: Data ya kusimbwa.
Return:
- Data iliyosimbwa, IV, na funguo iliyotumika kwa usimbaji. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)func encryptData(key, data []byte) ([]byte, []byte, []byte, error) {
prompt_1_segments:
Fanya usimbuaji wa data kwa kutumia funguo kwa njia ya CBC.
Funguo iliyotolewa ina byte za kutosha (>= 64 bytes) kwa ajili ya algorithms za AES na DES.
Chagua algorithm moja tu kutekeleza na tumia awali ya byte za funguo zilizotolewa zinazolingana na urefu unaohitajika.
Usichague algorithm kulingana na urefu wa funguo.
Rejesha data iliyosimbwa, IV (vector ya awali), na funguo iliyotumika kwa usimbaji.
Arguments:
- key: Byte za kutengeneza funguo ya usimbaji.
- data: Data ya kusimbwa.
Return:
- Data iliyosimbwa, IV, na funguo iliyotumika kwa usimbaji. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Perform data encryption using a key in CBC mode.
The provided key has enough bytes (>= 64 bytes) for AES and DES algorithms.
Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the initial bytes of the provided key that match the required length.
Do not choose the algorithm based on the key length.
Return the encrypted data, IV (initial vector), and the key used for encryption.
Arguments:
- key: Bytes to create the encryption key.
- data: Data to be encrypted.
Return:
- Encrypted data, IV, and the key used for encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)
prompt_2:
// Fanya usimbuaji wa data na ufunguo ukitumia njia ya CBC.
Bytes za ufunguo zilizotolewa ni ndefu vya kutosha (>= 64 bytes) kwa algorithimu za AES na DES.
Chagua algorithimu moja tu kutekeleza na tumia awamu ya bytes za ufunguo zilizotolewa inayolingana na urefu unaohitajika.
Usichague algorithimu kulingana na urefu wa ufunguo.
Rejesha data iliyosimbwa, IV (vector ya awali), na ufunguo ulitumika kwa usimbaji.
Arguments:
- key: Bytes za kuunda ufunguo wa usimbaji.
- data: Data ya kusimbwa.
Return:
- Data iliyosimbwa, IV, na ufunguo ulitumika kwa usimbaji. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)func encryptData(key, data []byte) ([]byte, []byte, []byte, error) {

prompt_en:
/*
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
*/
func encryptData(key []byte, data []byte) (encryptedData []byte, iv []byte, aesKey []byte) {
prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.

prompt_en:
/*
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Use these libs:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

We can construct a XPath query and then execute the query to search for the student information.

@param xmlData The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A tuple (name, age, citizenship) if the student is found. Otherwise, returns empty strings.
*/
func getStudentInfo(xmlData, username, password string) (string, string, string) {
